_comment: BB-skill-core ships no skills of its own; this base trigger file is intentionally empty. Per-language packs (rust-phase-skills, elixir-phase-skills, ...) drop their bundled-skill triggers into bb-skill-triggers.d/ — bb-skill-enforcement.py merges all of them at runtime. To add a trigger keyword, edit the relevant pack's drop-in file, not this one.
